page_metadata.biotools__summary: An online tool that facilitates curation of MAGE-TAB. It combines text-mining and the Experimental Factor Ontology (EFO) to create a semi-automatic environment for faster annotation, guided data-manipulation and content summary.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An online tool that facilitates curation of MAGE-TAB. It combines text-mining and the Experimental Factor Ontology (EFO) to create a semi-automatic environment for faster annotation, guided data-manipulation and content summary.
